none.$description: No shadow — flat surfaces, disabled states.

sm.$description: Small shadow — buttons, chips, badges. 4% opacity.

md.$description: Medium shadow — cards, dropdowns, tooltips. 6% opacity.

lg.$description: Large shadow — modals, side panels, floating elements. 8% opacity.

xl.$description: Extra-large shadow — popovers, command palettes. 13% opacity.

inner.$description: Inset shadow — pressed/active button states, inset input fields.
